headline: PepsiCo Expands Doritos Into Protein Snacks As Growth Story Evolves
summary: PepsiCo, ticker NasdaqGS:PEP, has launched Doritos Protein, a new high protein snack line. The company is partnering with Jack Link's to roll out Doritos branded meat sticks and jerky products. These moves expand PepsiCo's presence in the functional and protein focused snacking category. For investors watching PepsiCo at a share price of $159.43, this product push comes as the stock shows mixed recent returns, with a 6.1% decline over the past week and a 6.5% decline over the past 30 days...
